title: ID Card Replacement 身份证补办
scene: 在政府服务大厅补办身份证

lines.en: Welcome. How can I assist you today?
lines.zh: 欢迎。今天有什么可以帮您的？

lines.en: I lost my ID card and I need to apply for a replacement.
lines.zh: 我的身份证丢了，需要补办一张。

lines.en: I'm sorry to hear that. When did you lose it?
lines.zh: 很遗憾听到这个消息。您什么时候丢的？

lines.en: I think it was stolen yesterday at the shopping mall.
lines.zh: 我想是昨天在商场被偷了。

lines.en: Did you report it to the police?
Yes, I filed a police report this morning.
lines.zh: 是的，我今天早上报了案。

lines.en: Good. Please fill out this replacement form and take a new photo.
lines.zh: 好的。请填写这张补办申请表并拍一张新照片。

lines.en: How much is the replacement fee?
It's twenty-five dollars. Your new card will be ready in two weeks.
lines.zh: 二十五美元。您的新卡两周后就能办好。

lines.en: Thank you. I'll pick it up then.
